## AIRA Lives Inside Your Workflow

### AIRA Source - Search & Outreach Candidates Faster

Find candidates beyond your database and outreach faster with verified contact information, without changing tabs 

### AIRA Matchmaker- See Why Candidates Fit, Instantly

No complex Boolean searches. Type qualification criteria in plain English and get a shortlist in minutes with a criteria score that explains why a candidate is qualified 

### AIRA Notetaker - Convert Conversations Into Actions

Transcribes your calls, creates summaries, and assigns tasks to teams or individuals based on context from calls, emails, and notes 

### Job Change Alerts - Keep Your Data Updated & Actionable

Get notified when contacts change jobs or designations, keeping your database accurate at all times. Monitor key job changes and outwork competition 

Get Demo

## AI Recruitment: The Recruiterflow Way

AI recruitment is not the future, it’s the present. Here’s how Recruiterflow users are using AI to reduce admin, increase productivity, and revenue

### AIRA Notetaker

From call to CRM, Recruiterflow converts your call summaries into actionable insights

### Updated CRM Data

No more manual entry. AI Agents update the CRM so you can focus on business

### Market Research

Let AI find and share insights about prospects. No more templatized outreach

### Content Production

Create submission emails, job descriptions, pitches in seconds, not hours.

### Personalisation at Scale

With AIRA on your side, you can ditch generic templates and add context to each email and message.

### More Output. Same Team.

Recruiters can focus on what they do best—building relationships and driving revenue!

### More Conversations. NO Admin.

We will take over the admin so your recruiters can focus on closing more business

AI Agents on Recruiterflow

## The Force Behind AIRA

### AIRA Notetaker

Transcribes your calls, creates summaries, and assigns tasks to teams or individuals based on context from calls, emails, and notes 

### AIRA Matchmaker

Gives shortlist in minutes with a criteria score that explains why a candidate is qualified

### Update Field Agents

Auto-fills missing and outdated profile details based on your calls, emails, and recruiting activities 

### AIRA Source

Sourcing & recruiting without switching tabs. Discover new talent, capture profiles, and start conversations instantly. 

### Phone & Email Finder

Automatically finds and adds verified phone & work email 

### Summarisation Agent

Condenses full profiles into quick, digestible briefs 

### AIRA Task Agent

Extracts action items from your meetings and calls and auto-assigns follow-up tasks to the right teammate instantly 

### Research Agent

Gathers intelligence on people and companies before any outreach to offer unique insights to close deals 

### Outreach Agent

Drafts messaging for multi-channel sequences to reach the right candidates and clients with hyper-personalised messages 

## Can’t Find the Agent You Need?

### Request a Custom AI Agent for Your Workflow

Have a unique use case? AIRA is built to adapt. Whether it’s internal reporting, niche sourcing strategies, or specialized client workflows—our team can help craft a smart agent tailored to your recruitment operations.

Request a Custom Agent

KEY FEATURES

## The Old Way of Recruiting Is Over.

Recruiterflow’s AIRA Agents strip away admin, surface opportunities, and turn effort into placements. 

### 15% Increase in Pipeline

Job Change Alerts and AI signals work 24×7 to catch talent movement early — helping recruiters strike first and convert momentum into revenue. 

### 2× Recruiter Productivity

Your AI Twin handles CRM updates, summaries, and busywork automatically — so recruiters spend their time where it matters: candidates, clients, and closing. 

### 4× Recruiter Output

AI-powered workflows let every recruiter manage more roles, engage more talent, and close more placements — without burning out. 

FAQs

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How does AI recruiting software improve hiring efficiency? 

AI recruiting software automates admin-heavy tasks like resume screening, CRM updates, follow-ups, and scheduling.

This gives recruiters more time for conversations and placements, while AI surfaces insights from candidate data to speed up shortlisting and decision-making.

### What are the key features of advanced AI recruitment platforms?

Modern AI recruitment platforms typically include:

* AI sourcing and resume parsing
* Intelligent candidate matching
* Job change alerts
* Automatic CRM updates
* AI note-taking and task extraction
* Personalized outreach
* Hiring analytics

Together, these act like a digital teammate that absorbs manual work.

### What should I look for when comparing AI recruitment platforms?

Focus on how deeply AI is embedded into daily workflows.

The strongest platforms offer context-aware matching, admin automation, outreach support, and real-time insights — acting like an AI Twin that works alongside your team, 24×7.

### Can I migrate my data from another applicant tracking software(ATS)?

Yes you can! We offer data migration from most of the other leading ATS providers. Please get in touch with us to see if we can support your specific ATS for data migration.

### What AI tools are used for candidate screening?

AI screening tools analyze resumes, job requirements, and past interactions to rank candidates by relevance.

Instead of basic keyword filters, they evaluate candidates in context and explain *why* someone fits — helping recruiters build confident shortlists.

### Where can I find AI-based applicant tracking systems?

AI-based ATS platforms combine applicant tracking with CRM and built-in AI agents.

They don’t just store candidates — they capture conversations, enrich profiles, detect job changes, and support sourcing and outreach directly inside recruiter workflows.

### How do AI recruitment solutions help reduce recruiter burnout? 

By taking over repetitive admin like logging data, writing follow-ups, and summarizing calls, AI recruitment software gives recruiters back hours every week.

Curious to know more? Book a demo and 
our team will walk you through everything in detail.
